equivalence_argument: No complete mapping: block_time-aware helpers and EL-head wiring exist, but payload start/end and verified-block metric emission are not wired in the audited payload and verification paths.

checked_queries: block_time payload start end verified block metrics
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Payload build start/end and verified-block metric events are not produced with header block_time; only EL head update is wired with the canonical header timestamp.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-metrics/src/block.rs defines block_time fields on BlockBuildAttemptTrace and payload lifecycle helpers.
Search found no producer calls to record_block_build_attempt, log_payload_building_start, or log_payload_building_end outside helper definitions.

notes: This is stricter than the helper definitions: the invariant requires emitted events in the relevant lifecycle paths.
rationale: The primary diff adds block.timestamp-derived block_time fields to block lifecycle logging and changes log_el_update_head to accept and emit the canonical head timestamp. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Block lifecycle metric events for verified blocks, payload build start/end, and EL head updates should emit block_time from the block or payload header timestamp, distinct from local wall-clock microsecond trace timestamps.
suggested_falsification_tests: Install a tracing subscriber, call representative block lifecycle logging helpers with blocks or payloads whose header timestamp is known, and assert emitted events include block_time equal to that header timestamp while ts/ts_start/ts_end remain local microsecond wall-clock values.
summary: Block lifecycle block_time metrics are only partially wired.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Capture block lifecycle metrics during payload build, block verification, and EL head update; current code should only show EL head block_time while payload/verified-block producers are absent.
title: Block lifecycle metrics include header block time
